data.title: Vera Therapeutics awards inducement grants following Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) with undisclosed number.
data.description: A recent study found that around 70% of people believe that the government is hiding information about extraterrestrial life. The study surveyed 1000 individuals across various demographics. The data revealed that 80% of those surveyed felt that the government should be more transparent about the subject. Additionally, 60% of respondents claimed to have personally witnessed unidentified flying objects. The study raises questions about public trust in government disclosure regarding extraterrestrial life.

data.title: Preston Dermatology in NC wins Gold for Best Dermatologist & Bronze in DIAMOND Awards. Dr. Solomon honored.
data.description: Dr. Sheel Desai Solomon, who is a board-certified dermatologist, and her practice called Preston Dermatology & Skin Surgery Center in North Carolina, were recently recognized with the Gold award for Best Dermatologist by 5 West Magazine. This prestigious honor was conferred upon them for their exceptional services in the western Triangle region.

data.title: Andreessen Horowitz secures $15B to drive tech advancements, bolster US in tech race.
data.description: One of the leading cryptocurrency investors, Andreessen Horowitz, has successfully secured a substantial amount of $15 billion through various funds. The primary aim behind this significant fundraising is to drive investments in technology initiatives and play a pivotal role in enhancing the prospects of America's technological landscape.

data.title: Boyd Group Services Inc. acquires Joe Hudson's Collision Center, solidifying its position in the industry.
data.description: Boyd Group Services Inc. (TSX: BYD) (NYSE: BGSI) has strengthened its position as a prominent player in the North American collision industry with a recent acquisition. The company, known as BGSI or simply Boyd, finalized the acquisition of Joe, marking a significant milestone. This move showcases Boyd's commitment to growth and solidifies its reputation in the industry. This development comes amidst a rapidly evolving market landscape, underlining Boyd's strategic approach to expansion. The acquisition aligns with Boyd's ambitious goals and underscores its focus on enhancing market presence and capabilities.

data.title: Tilray's Q3 earnings beat expectations with $217.51 million revenue & $67.5 million in cannabis sales. Analysts say valuation looks attractive.
data.description: Tilray Brands Inc. (NASDAQ: TLRY) exceeded expectations in its quarterly report, posting earnings of one cent per share compared to the anticipated loss of 20 cents. Quarterly revenue totaled $217.51 million, surpassing the estimated $210.95 million. The breakdown showed a 3% increase in Cannabis net revenue reaching $67.5 million, Beverage net revenue at $50.1 million, and Wellness net revenue totaling $14.6 million. The growth in Cannabis sales was attributed to a 36% rise in international cannabis and a 6% increase in Canadian adult-use cannabis. Distribution net revenue, which includes Tilray Pharma, reached a record quarter revenue of $85.3 million. Tilray Medical U.S. also aims to capitalize on existing infrastructure for future growth.

data.title: Over 3,000 workers at Chicago medical centers demand fair contracts, to hold press conference on Jan 10.
data.description: More than 3,000 employees at Rush University Medical Center and University of Chicago Medical Center, who are being represented by Teamsters Local 743, are urging for fair contract agreements. A press conference has been scheduled for Saturday, Jan. 10th at 3 p.m. to address the current situation.

data.title: Guide Sensmart launched ApexVision, a next-gen thermal imaging tech, at CES 2026. Booth 21740, Central Hall showcased new products.
data.description: In Las Vegas on January 9, 2026, Guide Sensmart introduced its latest thermal imaging technology, ApexVision, at Booth 21740 in Central Hall. As a prominent global thermal imaging technology company, Guide Sensmart unveiled a range of new products integrated with ApexVision at this launch event.

data.title: Monica Christopher appointed Chief Philanthropy Officer at Meadows Foundation to assist in strategy and direction.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, in Dallas, it was revealed that Monica Christopher has assumed the position of Chief Philanthropy Officer at The Meadows Foundation. Working alongside Foundation President and CEO Eric R. Meadows, Christopher will play a key role in shaping the Foundation's strategy and direction.

data.title: US Postal Service to release new Forever stamp honoring Bruce Lee, martial artist & actor, for his influence on film; Stamp to be unveiled shortly.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, the United States Postal Service announced that they will be commemorating Bruce Lee, a celebrated Chinese American martial artist and actor, through the release of a new Forever stamp. Lee, known for his exceptional talent, charm, and on-screen charisma, left a lasting impact on audiences worldwide. This stamp will serve as a tribute to his legacy and will be available for purchase at all USPS locations for indefinite use.

data.title: Tulsa aims for Guinness record with Route 66 Capital Cruise, expected to draw attention with a classic car centennial parade.
data.description: A Guinness World Records adjudicator will be present at the upcoming Tulsa Route 66 Capital Cruise: Classic Car Centennial Parade in Tulsa, Oklahoma on January 9, 2026. The event is aiming to secure a new world record as part of the Capital of Route 66®'s grand festivities marking the 100th anniversary.

data.title: Crypto markets are gaining strength in 2026 as altcoins rebound. Bitcoin up 3%, tied to macro forces. $90,000 key level.
data.description: Cryptocurrency markets have started 2026 stronger following a period of weakness, with altcoins and meme coins making a rebound. Retail sentiment for major crypto assets is on the rise, driven more by macro factors like ETF flows and positioning dynamics than hype cycles, according to Santiment data. Bitcoin (BTC) has seen a 3% increase for the week and is displaying characteristics of a macro asset. Its price movement is now influenced by spot ETF flows, U.S. economic data, and interest rate expectations instead of traditional crypto narratives. Although selling pressure has lessened and sentiment has improved, the $90,000 mark remains a significant psychological level. Santiment suggests that a potential retreat to the mid-to-high $80,000 range could briefly spark retail concern, potentially paving the way for a stronger rally later in the year. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Origin Bancorp, Inc. to release Q4 and full year 2025 earnings on Jan. 28, with conference call on Jan. 29 at 8am CT.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, Origin Bancorp, Inc., the financial holding company for Origin Bank, announced that it will release its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results after the market closes on January 28, 2026. A conference call is scheduled to discuss these results on January 29, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. CT (9:00 a.m. ET). The call will feature Drake Mills, Chairman, President and CEO of Origin, William J. Wallace, IV, CFO of Origin, and Lance Hall, President and CEO of Origin Bank. Origin is listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol OBK.

data.title: Gavin Brownlie of Crosby Brownlie Inc. honored with 2025 Main Street America Award for leadership and community advancement in Rochester.
data.description: Gavin Brownlie, a member of Crosby Brownlie Inc., was honored with the esteemed GRA-HelloNation 2025 Main Street America Award for his remarkable commitment to supporting the workforce. His outstanding leadership skills and substantial contributions to his industry and the Rochester community were acknowledged.

data.title: TD Synnex's Q4 revenue at $17.4B surpasses predictions, with 9.7% Y/Y growth. EPS at $3.83, beats forecast by 24% - strong outlook ahead.
data.description: TD SYNNEX Corporation (SNX) delivered strong fourth-quarter results, with revenue reaching $17.4 billion, surpassing analysts' expectations of $16.9 billion, marking a 9.7% year-over-year increase. Adjusted EPS for the quarter stood at $3.83, beating the forecasted $3.73 per share and showing a remarkable 24.0% year-over-year growth. CEO Patrick Zammit expressed confidence in the company's outlook for the upcoming year, noting their specialized business model, strong portfolio focused on higher-growing technologies, and commitment to providing top-notch customer experiences.

data.title: Vietnam Polyester Fiber Import Guide 2023-2025 released by ResearchAndMarkets.com to assist in expansion. Industry overview provided.
data.description: Dublin-based ResearchAndMarkets.com has introduced the "Vietnam Polyester Fiber Import Guide 2023-2025" to aid global polyester fiber manufacturers, exporters, and suppliers in entering the Vietnamese market successfully. This guide offers insights into the Vietnamese Polyester Fiber industry, import market, and import company details for the specified period. Import-related businesses can make use of this information to strategize their market entry.
